summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All admin calendar management features verified: Admin login, dashboard stats, calendar view with monthly grid, booking CRUD (status changes, notes, delete), blocked slots (create, delete, affects public API), customer management with aggregated data. Chat welcome message correctly translates to DE/NL/EN. Mobile chat UI is full-screen on narrow viewport. 28/28 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified.
passed_tests: Admin login: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
Admin login: Invalid credentials correctly rejected with 401
Admin stats: GET /api/admin/stats returns total_leads, new_leads_today, upcoming_bookings, by_status
Admin calendar data: GET /api/admin/calendar-data?month=YYYY-MM returns bookings and blocked_slots
Admin calendar data: April 2026 shows 2 bookings and 1 blocked slot
Admin bookings list: GET /api/admin/bookings returns total and bookings array
Admin booking status update: PATCH /api/admin/bookings/:id with status works
Admin booking notes: PATCH /api/admin/bookings/:id with notes adds note to booking
Admin blocked slots: POST /api/admin/blocked-slots creates blocked slot
Admin blocked slots: All-day blocked slot returns empty slots from public API
Admin blocked slots: DELETE /api/admin/blocked-slots/:id removes blocked slot
Admin customers: GET /api/admin/customers returns aggregated customer list
Admin customers: Search works with ?search= parameter
Admin customer detail: GET /api/admin/customers/:email returns leads and bookings history
Admin leads: GET /api/admin/leads returns total and leads array
Admin leads: Search and filter by status work
Admin leads: PATCH /api/admin/leads/:id updates lead status
Booking status values: All 6 statuses work (confirmed, pending, completed, cancelled, no_show, rescheduled)
Unauthorized access: Endpoints correctly reject requests without token
Invalid token: Endpoints correctly reject invalid tokens
Chat welcome message: German - 'Willkommen bei NeXifyAI...'
Chat welcome message: English - 'Welcome to NeXifyAI...'
Chat welcome message: Dutch - 'Welkom bij NeXifyAI...'
Chat resets messages when language is switched
Mobile chat UI: Full-screen modal on narrow viewport (<768px)
Admin dashboard: Stats cards show Leads gesamt, Neue Leads, Buchungen, Chat-Sessions
Admin sidebar: Dashboard, Leads, Kalender, Kunden tabs all work
Admin calendar: Monthly grid renders with Mo-So headers
Admin calendar: Day cells show booking count badges (green) and blocked indicators (red)
Admin calendar: Click on day opens day detail panel with bookings and blockages
Admin calendar: Month navigation (prev/next) works
Admin calendar: 'Slot blockieren' button opens modal with date, time, reason, all_day fields
Admin calendar: Booking detail shows status buttons and notes input
Admin Kunden: Customer list shows aggregated data (Anfragen, Buchungen, Erster/Letzter Kontakt)
Admin Kunden: Click customer shows detail with leads and bookings history
Admin logout: Returns to login page
critical_code_review_comments: Admin panel well-implemented with 4 views (dashboard, leads, calendar, customers)
Calendar view correctly shows booking badges and blocked slot indicators
Booking status changes work with all 6 status values
Blocked slots correctly affect public booking API (GET /api/booking/slots)
Customer aggregation pipeline correctly groups by email and counts leads/bookings
Chat welcome message reset on language change implemented correctly in LiveChat component
Mobile chat CSS correctly applies full-screen modal on narrow viewport

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All admin and chat features verified

test_credentials.note: Password stored in backend/.env as ADMIN_PASSWORD

seed_data_creation: Test blocked slots created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin calendar management features verified in iteration 7: 1) Admin login with JWT, 2) Dashboard stats cards, 3) Calendar view with monthly grid, booking badges, blocked indicators, 4) Day detail panel with bookings and blockages, 5) Booking detail with status buttons and notes, 6) Blocked slot creation/deletion, 7) Customer management with aggregated data, 8) Chat welcome message translates to DE/NL/EN, 9) Mobile chat is full-screen. Existing test data: 2 bookings (April 6-7, 2026), 1 blocked slot (April 10, 2026). Note: Cookie banner may block interactions - dismiss first.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - Admin uses JWT auth, Booking creates real DB entries, Email notifications via Resend

features_verified.admin_login: POST /api/admin/login with form-urlencoded returns JWT token
features_verified.admin_dashboard: Stats cards: Leads gesamt, Neue Leads, Buchungen, Chat-Sessions
features_verified.admin_sidebar: 4 nav items: Dashboard, Leads, Kalender, Kunden - all work
features_verified.admin_calendar: Monthly grid with Mo-So headers, booking badges, blocked indicators
features_verified.admin_calendar_day_detail: Click day shows bookings and blockages for that day
features_verified.admin_booking_detail: Status buttons (6 statuses), notes input, delete button
features_verified.admin_blocked_slots: Create/delete blocked slots, affects public booking API
features_verified.admin_customers: Aggregated list with leads/bookings count, detail with history
features_verified.admin_leads: Search, filter by status, status update
features_verified.chat_welcome_translation: DE: Willkommen, EN: Welcome, NL: Welkom
